basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Narayanpur Gram Panchayat Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Panchayat Narayanpur Recruitment 2026: District Panchayat Narayanpur has released the official notification for 14 Gram Panchayat Secretary posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Chhattisgarh government rules for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-servicemen/Women.

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary, 1 year Diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from recognized institution
qualification.details: Higher Secondary pass + 1 year Diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from a recognized institution.

salary_details.details: Rs. 3500 - 10000 Per Month with Grade Pay 1100

selection_process: Merit based on Higher Secondary marks (50%) Higher educational qualification (max 10 marks) Computer Skill Test (25%) Experience as Rozgar Sahayak (max 15 marks)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.narayanpur.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Panchayat Narayanpur Gram Panchayat Secretary Job 2026 Notific

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Gram Panchayat Secretary position is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary education and possess a 1-year Diploma in Data Entry Operator/Programming from a recognized institution to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Chhattisgarh government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Gram Panchayat Secretary position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the Gram Panchayat Secretary post in District Panchayat Narayanpur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Gram Panchayat Secretary role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3500 to Rs. 10000 per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 1100.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Gram Panchayat Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit from Higher Secondary marks (50%), higher educational qualifications (max 10 marks), a Computer Skill Test (25%), and experience as Rozgar Sahayak (max 15 marks).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Narayanpur, which is www.narayanpur.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with your application form.
